label: PHAB Viva Inbound
info:
PHAB inbound flow: Viva CRM webhook -> immediate 200 OK -> fanout to Telegram relay and NestJS support ingest.

Incoming endpoint:
- POST /vivatest

Node-RED env vars:
- PHAB_API_BASE (default: http://localhost:3000/api)
- SUPPORT_INTEGRATION_TOKEN (optional)

Support ingest explicitly requests normal client delivery via support outbox (`deliverToClient=true`).

name: Env vars
info:
Set in Node-RED settings/env:
PHAB_API_BASE=http://localhost:3000/api
SUPPORT_INTEGRATION_TOKEN=<optional>

Public webhook path for Viva:
POST /vivatest

name: reply 200 to Viva
fanout Viva
log TG result
log support result
log unexpected error
